title: Home Electrical Services
excerpt: Safe, code-compliant electrical work for Charlotte homeowners. Whether you're renovating, adding circuits, or upgrading your panel, we've got you covered.

title: Commercial Electrical Services
excerpt: Downtime costs money. Our commercial electrical team delivers fast, reliable service to keep Charlotte businesses running safely and efficiently.

title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
excerpt: Outdated panels are a safety hazard and a bottleneck for modern homes. We upgrade 100A and 150A panels to 200A or 320A service quickly and safely.

title: EV Charger Installation
excerpt: Charge faster at home with a Level 2 EV charging station. We install all major brands, pull all permits, and complete most jobs in a single visit.

title: Generator Installation
excerpt: Keep your home powered through any outage with a professionally installed standby generator. We handle permits, wiring, and transfer switch installation.

title: 24/7 Emergency Electrical
excerpt: Electrical emergencies don't keep business hours. Our licensed electricians are available around the clock with no after-hours surcharge.
